title: Section 28
content: All moneys belonging to a Warehousing Corporation shall be deposited in the Reserve Bank or the State Bank 1[or any nationalised bank] or, subject to any rules made under this Act, in 2[any other scheduled bank] or co-operative bank.
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 42 of 1976, s. 8 (w.e.f. 24-3-1976). 2. Subs. by s. 8, ibid., for "any scheduled bank" (w.e.f. 24-3- 1976).
